title: Safety Standard Updated Event
description: Emitted when a safety standard is updated in the safety system.

metadata.description: Event metadata conforming to D2-2 Event Metadata Standard (10-field fixed template).

event_id.description: Globally unique identifier for the event instance.

version.description: Semantic version of the event schema.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the event was produced.

source.description: Origin system or service that produced the event.

producer.description: Specific component or service instance that produced the event.

correlation_id.description: Identifier used to correlate related events across multiple systems.

causation_id.description: Identifier of the event that caused this event (e.g., the parent command).

tenant_id.description: Tenant or organization namespace the event belongs to.

user_id.description: Identifier of the user who triggered the event.

standard_id.description: Unique identifier of the safety standard.

standard_name.description: Name of the safety standard (e.g., IEC 60335-2-40, GB 4706.32).

version.description: Version designation of the updated standard.

effective_date.description: ISO 8601 date when the standard update becomes effective.

previous_version.description: Previous version of the standard before the update.

change_summary.description: Summary of key changes introduced in this update.

updated_by.description: Identifier of the user or system that performed the update.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the standard was updated.
